description.value: Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Used for rolling to hit when fighting in ranged or melee combat, in place of any other skills. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling checks involving feats of physicality, including athletics and evasion. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling when making checks that require training or finesse. Note: if the task is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers accordingly. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

A classic, double-barrel shotgun. Hasn't weathered the test of time especially well, but still in demand despite that.

Can only load basic shells. The Boomstick is a standard-quality shotgun with RoF and magazine size of 2. Any turn that both shells are fired, the player only makes one attack roll for both rounds of damage.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 1/Peon - The meanest of Night City and what happens when your average civilian is forced to put anything on the line.

Gang-Wide Ability - Well that was embarrassing: If a player character is brought to 0 HP or killed due to the actions of a street thug, they lose 1 rep and the ganger responsible gains 1 rep.

Ability - Momma always told me ‘be prepared’: Weapons are always concealed if the punk wants them to be, but can be located with a DV9 Conceal/Reveal weapons check, or as an incidental with 1 point in the Conceal/Reveal weapons skill.

Extra Gear - Choose between a heavy pistol & ammo or a boomstick & ammo.

I bet a lot of your old friends look just like this, eh? That bodega clerk or bartender, that girl with the rebellious streak and a chip on her shoulder? Piece of advice, choom - forget about them. Everyone’s trying to survive here, just like you and me, don’t hesitate if they get in the way.
